zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary於1218年之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Richard Lovel Lord of Cary11214歲，母親Alice Lovel17歲。他於大約1234年與Eve在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年9月5日之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary于1218年之前出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Richard Lovel Lord of Cary11214岁，母亲Alice Lovel17岁。他于大约1234年与Eve在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年9月5日之前在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡素 加里。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary was born before 1218, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Lovel Lord of Cary, was 11214 and his mother, Alice Lovel, was 17. He married Eve about 1234, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 5 September 1263, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary est né avant 1218, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Lovel Lord of Cary, avait 11214 ans et sa mère, Alice Lovel, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Eve environ 1234, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 5 septembre 1263, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary vor 1218 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Lovel Lord of Cary 11214 und seine Mutter Alice Lovel 17. Er hat um 1234 in England Eve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 5. September 1263 in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary è nato il prima del 1218 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Lovel Lord of Cary, aveva 11214 anni e il suo madre, Alice Lovel, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Eve circa 1234, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 5 settembre 1263, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Caryが1218年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Richard Lovel Lord of Caryは11214歳，母Alice Lovelは17歳であった。約1234年にイギリスでEveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年9月5日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(이)가 1218년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lovel Lord of Cary(은)는 11214세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Lovel(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1234년 영국에서 Eve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 9월 5일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary nasceu antes 1218, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Lovel Lord of Cary, tinha 11214 anos e sua mãe, Alice Lovel, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve aproximadamente 1234, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 5 de setembro de 1263, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary родился перед 1218 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Lovel Lord of Cary было 11214 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Lovel, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve около 1234 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 5 сентябрь 1263 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
